query: SELECT wh.id, wh.gestanteId, g.nome AS gestanteNome, wh.telefone, wh.mensagem, wh.tipo, wh.status, wh.enviadoEm, wh.erro FROM whatsappHistorico wh LEFT JOIN gestantes g ON wh.gestanteId = g.id WHERE wh.enviadoEm >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) ORDER BY wh.enviadoEm DESC LIMIT 50;
